Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 18 

DIALYS_EVENTS 

LABEL: Dialysis Events 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments for Part B dialysis services (primarily the professional 
component since treatments are covered in hospital outpatient) for a given year. An event is defined as 
each line item that contains the relevant service. Dialysis claims are a subset of the claims, and a subset
